title: 🔥本轮周期底明显抬高
body: 市场处于估值结构性抬升期。MVRV录得1.49，大幅高于上轮周期同期（2022-06）的1.05。尽管AHR999处于定投区，但对比历史同期显示，当前筹码成本中枢明显上移。这种分化意味着市场难现深跌，后续若无量能配合，震荡将成为常态。中性。历史估值底还有效吗？
title_en: 🔥 The floor for this cycle is clearly higher
body_en: We are in a phase of structural valuation expansion. MVRV sits at 1.49, significantly outpacing the 1.05 from the same point in the last cycle (Jun '22). While AHR999 remains in the accumulation zone, a historical comparison shows that the average cost basis has clearly shifted upward. This divergence suggests deep sell-offs are unlikely. Unless we see volume support, sideways trading will become the new norm. Neutral. Are historical valuation bottoms still valid?
